pg_intermediate_query: WITH RankedAdmFName AS ( SELECT "AdmFName1", COUNT("AdmFName1") AS name_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT("AdmFName1") DESC, "AdmFName1" ASC) as rn FROM "schools" WHERE "AdmFName1" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "AdmFName1" ) SELECT DISTINCT T1."AdmFName1", T1."District" FROM "schools" AS T1 INNER JOIN RankedAdmFName AS T2 ON T1."AdmFName1" = T2."AdmFName1" WHERE T2.rn <= 2 ORDER BY T1."AdmFName1" ASC, T1."District" ASC
